title: Session fields skip_serializing_if is a no-op on Deserialize-only struct
description: jmap.rs: Session derives only Deserialize, but owner_user_id, owner_login, and owner_endpoints carry serde(skip_serializing_if = ...). The attribute is silently ignored by serde. A reader scanning the struct will think Session is meant to be serialized. Either remove the dead attributes or add a comment explaining they are retained for symmetry/future use.
